dataset_name: 蓝莓成熟度目标检测数据集
standard_reference: TC609-5-2025-01 高质量数据集 建设指南
TC609-5-2025-02 高质量数据集 格式要求
TC609-5-2025-03 高质量数据集 分类指南
TC609-5-2025-04 高质量数据集 质量评测规范
record_format: JSON Lines; one data record per image

required_fields.annotation: object with label array and annotation metadata
required_fields.last_modified_time: date string from local image/label modification date
required_fields.generated_data_indicator: 0 for non-generated data, 1 for generated data

A_ZENODO_BLUEBERRY_DCM.source_dataset_name: BlueberryDCM: A Canopy Image Dataset for Detection, Counting, and Maturity Assessment of Blueberries
A_ZENODO_BLUEBERRY_DCM.reference: Deng, B., Lu, Y., Li, Z. (2024). Detection, counting, and maturity assessment of blueberries in canopy images using YOLOv8 and YOLOv9. DOI 10.1016/j.atech.2024.100620.

B_KAGGLE_BLUEBERRY_DETECTION.reference: Li, Zhengkun et al. Blueberry Yield Estimation Through Multi-View Imagery with YOLOv8 Object Detection, ASABE 2023.

source_evidence.mapping_note: Per-record source attribution is stored in metadata/source_attribution.csv. Filename-derived mappings must be reviewed before final submission.
